response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Skit audio manually transcribed. Song vocals phonetically match the lyrics provided in the reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics provided in the reference JSON were fully utilized for transcription and translation, aligned with the video's actual end time. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely to the vocal cues. Skit dialogue is parsed rapidly with tight end-start constraints to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: みんな！コークは持ったかな？
subtitles.english: Everyone! Do you have your Coke?

subtitles.original: 持ちました！乾杯する！
こらこら、早いよ、ラプラスちゃん！
避けるな！ / あたる！
年越しのタイミングで、みんなで乾杯ってするんだよ！
subtitles.english: At the turn of the year, we're all going to toast together!

subtitles.original: やだやだ！もう喉カラカラ！
subtitles.english: No, no! My throat is parched!

subtitles.original: ふふ、楽しみだね！
ね？みこさん？みこさん？
いやー！良いライブだったねー！
subtitles.english: Wow! That was a great live show!

subtitles.original: お疲れ！ / いぇーい！
この後どうする？ご飯食べる？
subtitles.english: What should we do now? Grab some food?

subtitles.original: いやー、どこも混んでんじゃない？
確かに！
もう帰りますかねー。あ、運転手さん、まっすぐね！
subtitles.english: I guess we'll head home. Oh, driver, go straight!

subtitles.original: お前ら！何帰ってんだ！
subtitles.english: You guys! Why are you going home?!

subtitles.original: 乾杯！乾杯！
フブちゃんたちが付いてきてる！
subtitles.english: Fubu-chan and the others are chasing us!

subtitles.original: おらおらフブす、寂しくなっちゃったのかね？
subtitles.english: My, my, Fubus. Did she get lonely?

subtitles.original: 待てーーー！
なんか怒ってない？
subtitles.english: Doesn't she look kind of mad?

subtitles.original: やばい、あの悪戯がバレたかね？
subtitles.english: Uh oh, did they find out about that prank?

subtitles.original: あははは！やりすぎだったかなー！
subtitles.english: Ahahaha! Maybe we went a bit too far!

subtitles.original: やばいかも！運転手さん、ごめん！
subtitles.english: This might be bad! Driver, sorry!

subtitles.original: みこ、ドラテクで逃げるぞ！
subtitles.english: Miko's gonna use her drift skills to escape!

subtitles.original: うわーーーお！うわーーーお！
あ、来た！
すごい！すごい！
フブちゃんごめんって！もう悪戯しないから！
subtitles.english: Fubu-chan, we're sorry! We won't play pranks anymore!

subtitles.original: だめだよみこみこ、反省しなさい！
subtitles.english: That's no good, Mikomiko. You must reflect!

subtitles.original: お前も共犯だろうが！
何の話だ？
二人ともこれ持って！
何するの？
もうすぐ新年だよ！
